[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_61] Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow assume role permission across all services

[NONE][CKV_AWS_237] Ensure Create before destroy for API Gateway

failure.message: Ensure Create before destroy for API Gateway

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_api_gateway_rest_api.main File: /apigateway.tf: 2-5 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-aws-api-gateway-enables-create-before-destroy
2 | resource "aws_api_gateway_rest_api" "main" { 3 | name = "eventos-api" 4 | description = "API para eventos" 5 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_217] Ensure Create before destroy for API deployments

failure.message: Ensure Create before destroy for API deployments

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_api_gateway_deployment.api_deployment File: /apigateway.tf: 86-94 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-aws-api-deployments-enable-create-before-destroy
86 | resource "aws_api_gateway_deployment" "api_deployment" { 87 | rest_api_id = aws_api_gateway_rest_api.main.id 88 | 89 | depends_on = [ 90 | aws_api_gateway_integration.login_integration, 91 | aws_api_gateway_integration.eventos_integration, 92 | aws_api_gateway_integration.register_event 93 | ] 94 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_76] Ensure API Gateway has Access Logging enabled

failure.message: Ensure API Gateway has Access Logging enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_api_gateway_stage.api_stage File: /apigateway.tf: 96-103 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-logging-policies/logging-17
96 | resource "aws_api_gateway_stage" "api_stage" { 97 | deployment_id = aws_api_gateway_deployment.api_deployment.id 98 | rest_api_id = aws_api_gateway_rest_api.main.id 99 | stage_name = var.environment 100 | 101 | # Habilitar X-Ray tracing (solución CKV_AWS_73) 102 | xray_tracing_enabled = true 103 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_120] Ensure API Gateway caching is enabled

failure.message: Ensure API Gateway caching is enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_api_gateway_stage.api_stage File: /apigateway.tf: 96-103 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-api-gateway-caching-is-enabled
96 | resource "aws_api_gateway_stage" "api_stage" { 97 | deployment_id = aws_api_gateway_deployment.api_deployment.id 98 | rest_api_id = aws_api_gateway_rest_api.main.id 99 | stage_name = var.environment 100 | 101 | # Habilitar X-Ray tracing (solución CKV_AWS_73) 102 | xray_tracing_enabled = true 103 | }

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_s3_bucket_object.frontend_files File: /frontend.tf: 1-18 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-general-106
1 | resource "aws_s3_bucket_object" "frontend_files" { 2 | for_each = fileset("${path.module}/../frontend", "*/") 3 | 4 | bucket = aws_s3_bucket.mi_bucket_web.bucket 5 | key = each.value 6 | source = "${path.module}/../frontend/${each.value}" 7 | etag = filemd5("${path.module}/../frontend/${each.value}") 8 | content_type = lookup({ 9 | html = "text/html" 10 | js = "application/javascript" 11 | css = "text/css" 12 | png = "image/png" 13 | jpg = "image/jpeg" 14 | jpeg = "image/jpeg" 15 | webp = "image/webp" 16 | ico = "image/x-icon" 17 | }, split(".", each.value)[length(split(".", each.value)) - 1], "application/octet-stream") 18 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_290] Ensure IAM policies does not allow write access without constraints

failure.message: Ensure IAM policies does not allow write access without constraints

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_iam_policy.lambda_policy File: /iam-lambda.tf: 19-50 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-iam-policies/bc-aws-290
19 | resource "aws_iam_policy" "lambda_policy" { 20 | name = "lambda_policy" 21 | 22 | policy = jsonencode({ 23 | Version = "2012-10-17" 24 | Statement = [ 25 | { 26 | Effect = "Allow" 27 | Action = [ 28 | "logs:CreateLogGroup", 29 | "logs:CreateLogStream", 30 | "logs:PutLogEvents" 31 | ] 32 | Resource = "arn:aws:logs:*:*:*" 33 | }, 34 | { 35 | Effect = "Allow" 36 | Action = [ 37 | "ec2:CreateNetworkInterface", 38 | "ec2:DescribeNetworkInterfaces", 39 | "ec2:DeleteNetworkInterface" 40 | ] 41 | Resource = "*" 42 | }, 43 | { 44 | Effect = "Allow" 45 | Action = ["rds-db:connect"] 46 | Resource = aws_db_instance.postgres_db.arn 47 | } 48 | ] 49 | }) 50 | }

failure.message: Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_iam_policy.lambda_policy File: /iam-lambda.tf: 19-50 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-iam-policies/bc-aws-355
19 | resource "aws_iam_policy" "lambda_policy" { 20 | name = "lambda_policy" 21 | 22 | policy = jsonencode({ 23 | Version = "2012-10-17" 24 | Statement = [ 25 | { 26 | Effect = "Allow" 27 | Action = [ 28 | "logs:CreateLogGroup", 29 | "logs:CreateLogStream", 30 | "logs:PutLogEvents" 31 | ] 32 | Resource = "arn:aws:logs:*:*:*" 33 | }, 34 | { 35 | Effect = "Allow" 36 | Action = [ 37 | "ec2:CreateNetworkInterface", 38 | "ec2:DescribeNetworkInterfaces", 39 | "ec2:DeleteNetworkInterface" 40 | ] 41 | Resource = "*" 42 | }, 43 | { 44 | Effect = "Allow" 45 | Action = ["rds-db:connect"] 46 | Resource = aws_db_instance.postgres_db.arn 47 | } 48 | ] 49 | }) 50 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_173] Check encryption settings for Lambda environmental variable

failure.message: Check encryption settings for Lambda environmental variable

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_lambda_function.login_user File: /lambda-loginUser.tf: 11-39 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-serverless-policies/bc-aws-serverless-5
11 | resource "aws_lambda_function" "login_user" { 12 | filename = data.archive_file.lambda_login_user.output_path 13 | function_name = "lambda-login-user" 14 | role = aws_iam_role.lambda_exec_role.arn 15 | handler = "index.handler" 16 | runtime = "nodejs16.x" 17 | 18 | # Hash del código fuente para detectar cambios 19 | source_code_hash = data.archive_file.lambda_login_user.output_base64sha256 20 | 21 | # Configuración de red VPC para acceder a RDS 22 | vpc_config { 23 | subnet_ids = [aws_subnet.public_a.id, aws_subnet.public_b.id] 24 | security_group_ids = [aws_security_group.lambda_sg.id] 25 | } 26 | 27 | # Variables de entorno para la conexión a la base de datos 28 | environment { 29 | variables = { 30 | DB_HOST = aws_db_instance.postgres_db.endpoint # Endpoint de RDS 31 | DB_NAME = aws_db_instance.postgres_db.db_name # Nombre de la base de datos 32 | DB_USER = var.db_username # Usuario de la base de datos 33 | DB_PASS = var.db_password # Contraseña de la base de datos 34 | } 35 | } 36 | 37 | # Límite de concurrencia por función (solución CKV_AWS_115) 38 | reserved_concurrent_executions = 5 39 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_116] Ensure that AWS Lambda function is configured for a Dead Letter Queue(DLQ)

failure.message: Ensure that AWS Lambda function is configured for a Dead Letter Queue(DLQ)

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_lambda_function.login_user File: /lambda-loginUser.tf: 11-39 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-that-aws-lambda-function-is-configured-for-a-dead-letter-queue-dlq
11 | resource "aws_lambda_function" "login_user" { 12 | filename = data.archive_file.lambda_login_user.output_path 13 | function_name = "lambda-login-user" 14 | role = aws_iam_role.lambda_exec_role.arn 15 | handler = "index.handler" 16 | runtime = "nodejs16.x" 17 | 18 | # Hash del código fuente para detectar cambios 19 | source_code_hash = data.archive_file.lambda_login_user.output_base64sha256 20 | 21 | # Configuración de red VPC para acceder a RDS 22 | vpc_config { 23 | subnet_ids = [aws_subnet.public_a.id, aws_subnet.public_b.id] 24 | security_group_ids = [aws_security_group.lambda_sg.id] 25 | } 26 | 27 | # Variables de entorno para la conexión a la base de datos 28 | environment { 29 | variables = { 30 | DB_HOST = aws_db_instance.postgres_db.endpoint # Endpoint de RDS 31 | DB_NAME = aws_db_instance.postgres_db.db_name # Nombre de la base de datos 32 | DB_USER = var.db_username # Usuario de la base de datos 33 | DB_PASS = var.db_password # Contraseña de la base de datos 34 | } 35 | } 36 | 37 | # Límite de concurrencia por función (solución CKV_AWS_115) 38 | reserved_concurrent_executions = 5 39 | }

failure.message: X-Ray tracing is enabled for Lambda

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_lambda_function.login_user File: /lambda-loginUser.tf: 11-39 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-serverless-policies/bc-aws-serverless-4
11 | resource "aws_lambda_function" "login_user" { 12 | filename = data.archive_file.lambda_login_user.output_path 13 | function_name = "lambda-login-user" 14 | role = aws_iam_role.lambda_exec_role.arn 15 | handler = "index.handler" 16 | runtime = "nodejs16.x" 17 | 18 | # Hash del código fuente para detectar cambios 19 | source_code_hash = data.archive_file.lambda_login_user.output_base64sha256 20 | 21 | # Configuración de red VPC para acceder a RDS 22 | vpc_config { 23 | subnet_ids = [aws_subnet.public_a.id, aws_subnet.public_b.id] 24 | security_group_ids = [aws_security_group.lambda_sg.id] 25 | } 26 | 27 | # Variables de entorno para la conexión a la base de datos 28 | environment { 29 | variables = { 30 | DB_HOST = aws_db_instance.postgres_db.endpoint # Endpoint de RDS 31 | DB_NAME = aws_db_instance.postgres_db.db_name # Nombre de la base de datos 32 | DB_USER = var.db_username # Usuario de la base de datos 33 | DB_PASS = var.db_password # Contraseña de la base de datos 34 | } 35 | } 36 | 37 | # Límite de concurrencia por función (solución CKV_AWS_115) 38 | reserved_concurrent_executions = 5 39 | }

11 | resource "aws_lambda_function" "login_user" { 12 | filename = data.archive_file.lambda_login_user.output_path 13 | function_name = "lambda-login-user" 14 | role = aws_iam_role.lambda_exec_role.arn 15 | handler = "index.handler" 16 | runtime = "nodejs16.x" 17 | 18 | # Hash del código fuente para detectar cambios 19 | source_code_hash = data.archive_file.lambda_login_user.output_base64sha256 20 | 21 | # Configuración de red VPC para acceder a RDS 22 | vpc_config { 23 | subnet_ids = [aws_subnet.public_a.id, aws_subnet.public_b.id] 24 | security_group_ids = [aws_security_group.lambda_sg.id] 25 | } 26 | 27 | # Variables de entorno para la conexión a la base de datos 28 | environment { 29 | variables = { 30 | DB_HOST = aws_db_instance.postgres_db.endpoint # Endpoint de RDS 31 | DB_NAME = aws_db_instance.postgres_db.db_name # Nombre de la base de datos 32 | DB_USER = var.db_username # Usuario de la base de datos 33 | DB_PASS = var.db_password # Contraseña de la base de datos 34 | } 35 | } 36 | 37 | # Límite de concurrencia por función (solución CKV_AWS_115) 38 | reserved_concurrent_executions = 5 39 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_161] Ensure RDS database has IAM authentication enabled

failure.message: Ensure RDS database has IAM authentication enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_db_instance.postgres_db File: /rds.tf: 2-23 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-iam-policies/ensure-rds-database-has-iam-authentication-enabled
2 | resource "aws_db_instance" "postgres_db" { 3 | identifier = "eventos-db" 4 | engine = "postgres" 5 | engine_version = "14" 6 | instance_class = "db.t3.micro" 7 | allocated_storage = 20 8 | publicly_accessible = true 9 | 10 | db_name = "eventosdb" 11 | username = var.db_username 12 | password = var.db_password 13 | 14 | # Configuración de VPC 15 | db_subnet_group_name = aws_db_subnet_group.rds_subnet_group.name 16 | vpc_security_group_ids = [aws_security_group.rds_sg.id] 17 | 18 | skip_final_snapshot = true 19 | 20 | tags = { 21 | Environment = var.environment 22 | } 23 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_23] Ensure every security group and rule has a description

failure.message: Ensure every security group and rule has a description

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_security_group.rds_sg File: /rds.tf: 36-65 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/networking-31
36 | resource "aws_security_group" "rds_sg" { 37 | name = "rds-security-group" 38 | description = "Security group for RDS PostgreSQL" 39 | vpc_id = aws_vpc.main_vpc.id 40 | 41 | # Regla para acceso a PostgreSQL 42 | ingress { 43 | from_port = 5432 44 | to_port = 5432 45 | protocol = "tcp" 46 | cidr_blocks = var.allowed_cidr_blocks 47 | description = "PostgreSQL access from anywhere (development only)" 48 | } 49 | 50 | # Acceso desde Lambda 51 | ingress { 52 | from_port = 5432 53 | to_port = 5432 54 | protocol = "tcp" 55 | security_groups = [aws_security_group.lambda_sg.id] 56 | description = "Access from Lambda functions" 57 | } 58 | 59 | egress { 60 | from_port = 0 61 | to_port = 0 62 | protocol = "-1" 63 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 64 | } 65 | }

failure.message: Ensure no security groups allow egress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port -1

testcase.failure:

36 | resource "aws_security_group" "rds_sg" { 37 | name = "rds-security-group" 38 | description = "Security group for RDS PostgreSQL" 39 | vpc_id = aws_vpc.main_vpc.id 40 | 41 | # Regla para acceso a PostgreSQL 42 | ingress { 43 | from_port = 5432 44 | to_port = 5432 45 | protocol = "tcp" 46 | cidr_blocks = var.allowed_cidr_blocks 47 | description = "PostgreSQL access from anywhere (development only)" 48 | } 49 | 50 | # Acceso desde Lambda 51 | ingress { 52 | from_port = 5432 53 | to_port = 5432 54 | protocol = "tcp" 55 | security_groups = [aws_security_group.lambda_sg.id] 56 | description = "Access from Lambda functions" 57 | } 58 | 59 | egress { 60 | from_port = 0 61 | to_port = 0 62 | protocol = "-1" 63 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 64 | } 65 | }

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_api_gateway_stage.api_stage File: /apigateway.tf: 96-103 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-logging-policies/ensure-api-gateway-stage-have-logging-level-defined-as-appropiate
96 | resource "aws_api_gateway_stage" "api_stage" { 97 | deployment_id = aws_api_gateway_deployment.api_deployment.id 98 | rest_api_id = aws_api_gateway_rest_api.main.id 99 | stage_name = var.environment 100 | 101 | # Habilitar X-Ray tracing (solución CKV_AWS_73) 102 | xray_tracing_enabled = true 103 | }
